mechanism_narrative: A rise in the unemployment rate signals a weakening labor market, which tends to compress equity cash flows and produce negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains above 0.03 over any 2-year rolling window, or 20-day forward returns in tightening periods are not significantly lower than baseline (t-test p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: A decline in the goods and services demand proxy signals a weakening economy, which tends to compress equity cash flows and produce negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
candidate_trigger: RSAFS falls below 50% of its historical average in 3 months
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains above 0.03 over any 2-year rolling window, or 20-day forward returns in tightening periods are not significantly lower than baseline (t-test p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: A rise in the industrial production proxy signals a strengthening supply chain, which tends to compress equity cash flows and produce negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
candidate_trigger: INDPRO rises above 120% of its historical average in 1 month
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains below 0.03 over any 2-year rolling window, or 20-day forward returns in tightening periods are not significantly lower than baseline (t-test p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: A decline in the federal funds rate signals an easing monetary cycle that compresses discount rates applied to equity cash flows, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains below 0.03 over any 2-year rolling window, or 20-day forward returns in easing periods are not significantly higher than baseline (t-test p > 0.05).
